ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the course */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course session */,
  "days_time" TEXT /* Days and time of the course session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course session */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of enrolled students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course schedule */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the registration */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Reference to any applied discount */,
  "registration_source" TEXT /* Source of registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the registration */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_confirmation" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the payment is confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course schedule */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the student in the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the registration */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (e.g., course start, payment due) */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "reminder_message" TEXT /* Custom message for the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the student */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reward */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "discount_percent" TEXT /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the discount */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the student */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "recommendation" INTEGER /* Whether the student would recommend the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Area of specialty for the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor mapping */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
